reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien. Atienden rápido, están atentos a las necesidades de los automóviles y automovilistas. Siempre con buena onda, incluso en las fechas claves de recambio en temporadas turísticas.

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service. They're fast and attentive to the needs of both cars and drivers. They're always friendly, even during peak tourist seasons.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNFdExDekp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen un pésimo servicio de confitería a pesar de pertenecer al automóvil club argentino es muy mal mantenido y sucio

(Translated by Google)
They have terrible confectionery service, despite belonging to the Argentine Automobile Club; it is very poorly maintained and dirty.

reviews.comment:
La única YPF del pueblo, labura a full porque no hay muchas opciones, podrían arreglar un poco más el lugar está viejo y descuidado. En temporada podrían contratar un empleado más, las colas son larguísimas con solo 2 empleados

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF gas station in town is working flat out because there aren't many options. They could do a bit more to fix things up; the place is old and neglected. During peak season, they could hire another employee; the lines are incredibly long with only two staff members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0aEp1YldREAE
